title: Oil futures rise after U.S., Iran trade fire; stock futures quiet after court rejects Trump’s tariffs
summary: Oil futures climbed Thursday following military exchanges between the U.S. and Iran in the Persian Gulf, while stock futures remained relatively flat after a federal court invalidated Trump's backup tariff plan. The developments highlight geopolitical tensions affecting energy markets and policy uncertainty impacting equities.
content: Oil futures moved higher late Thursday while stock-index futures were little changed after the U.S. and Iran exchanged fire in the Persian Gulf,  and after a federal court struck down President Donald Trump’s backup tariff plan.

zh.title: 美国伊朗冲突后油期货上升；法院驳回特朗普关税计划后股指期货平稳
zh.summary: 周四油期货在美国与伊朗在波斯湾的军事交换后上升，而在联邦法院无效特朗普备用关税计划后股指期货保持相对平稳。这些事件突显影响能源市场的地缘政治紧张局势和影响股市的政策不确定性。

title: Cloudflare to cut 20% of staff in a big bet on AI. Investors aren’t sold.
summary: Cloudflare announced a 20% workforce reduction that executives frame as an AI-focused investment rather than cost-cutting, but investors reacted negatively with stock declines. The disconnect between management's strategic vision and market skepticism underscores concerns about the company's transformation approach.
content: The company’s stock falls as co-founders say the layoffs are “not a cost-cutting exercise.”

zh.title: Cloudflare削减20%员工进行AI大赌注。投资者不看好。
zh.summary: Cloudflare宣布员工减少20%，高管将其框架为专注于AI的投资而非成本削减，但投资者反应消极，股价下跌。管理层战略愿景与市场怀疑之间的脱节强调了人们对公司转型方法的担忧。

title: Iren’s stock soars as a major Nvidia investment overshadows revenue shortfall
summary: Iren's stock surged after Nvidia announced a major investment stake to build out a 5-gigawatt global AI data center footprint. The strong market reaction prioritizes Nvidia's long-term infrastructure ambitions over Iren's current revenue shortfall.
content: Nvidia is taking a major stake in Iren to build out a 5-gigawatt global footprint for its AI factory ambitions

zh.title: 英伟达重大投资使Iren股价飙升，收入不足被掩盖
zh.summary: Nvidia宣布进行重大投资以建立5吉瓦全球AI数据中心，随后Iren股价飙升。强劲的市场反应优先考虑英伟达的长期基础设施雄心，而非Iren目前的收入不足。

title: SoundHound’s stock falls as acquisitions weigh on earnings results
summary: SoundHound's stock declined as recent acquisitions pressured quarterly earnings, though the company noted revenue would have grown more without them. Despite analysts viewing the acquisitions as strategically valuable, investors focused on near-term earnings headwinds.
content: The company said revenue would’ve grown more not counting its recent acquisitions, but analysts say they put SoundHound in a strong position.

zh.title: SoundHound股票下跌，因收购压低财报业绩
zh.summary: SoundHound股票下跌，因最近的收购压低了季度业绩，尽管公司表示若没有这些收购，收入增长会更快。尽管分析师认为这些收购战略上具有价值，但投资者关注的是短期业绩逆风。

title: Airbnb is seeing some of its fastest growth from this surprising segment
summary: Airbnb is experiencing rapid growth from hotel bookings following its recent market expansion, offsetting some demand disruptions caused by Iran-U.S. tensions. The platform's diversification strategy is showing early signs of success in a traditionally core business segment.
content: The travel app has seen some demand disruptions from the Iran war, but is showing early success with its recent pivot into offering hotel bookings

zh.title: Airbnb在这个令人惊讶的领域看到了一些最快的增长
zh.summary: Airbnb在最近市场扩张后，通过酒店预订实现快速增长，抵消了伊朗-美国紧张关系造成的部分需求下降。该平台的多元化战略在传统核心业务领域显示出早期成功迹象。

title: AI is coming for your job after all. These new announcements prove it.
summary: Major technology companies including Cloudflare, Upwork, and Bill announced significant workforce reductions this week, building on Coinbase's earlier layoffs. The coordinated wave of cuts signals that AI-driven business optimization is moving from industry promise to concrete employment impact.
content: The tech sector is leading a rush of mass layoffs. Cloudflare, Upwork, Bill outlined big cuts on Thursday, following Coinbase’s announcement earlier in the week.

zh.title: AI最终还是会来抢你的工作。这些新公告证明了这一点。
zh.summary: 包括Cloudflare、Upwork和Bill在内的主要科技公司本周宣布大幅裁员，延续Coinbase之前的裁员行动。这一协调一致的裁员浪潮表明，AI驱动的商业优化正在从行业承诺转变为具体的就业影响。

title: Oil prices rise after US and Iran exchange fire in Hormuz strait
summary: Oil prices increased following military exchanges between the U.S. and Iran in the Hormuz Strait, escalating risks to the fragile ceasefire Trump extended indefinitely on April 21. The clash threatens critical energy supply routes and could sustain commodity price pressures.
content: The flare-up further endangers the US-Iran ceasefire, which Trump extended indefinitely on 21 April.

zh.title: 美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡交火后油价上升
zh.summary: 美伊在霍尔木兹海峡的军事冲突导致油价上升，加剧了特朗普在4月21日无限期延长的脆弱停火的风险。这场冲突威胁关键能源供应路线，可能导致商品价格压力持续。

title: 5 reasons stocks are rallying in the face of an oil-price shock
summary: U.S. stocks finished the week higher despite Thursday losses, with the S&P 500 approaching 7,400 for the first time in history amid oil-price volatility. The rally suggests investors are looking past near-term commodity shocks to longer-term economic fundamentals.
content: U.S. stocks were lower Thursday but still higher for the week, with the S&P 500 on the verge of breaking above 7,400 for the first time ever.

zh.title: 股市在油价冲击面前上涨的5个原因
zh.summary: 尽管周四下跌，美国股市本周收高，标普500指数在油价波动中首次接近7400点。这轮上涨表明投资者超越短期商品冲击，转向关注长期经济基本面。

title: Asia-Pacific markets open lower on fresh Iran-U.S. tensions following clashes
summary: Asia-Pacific markets declined Friday as geopolitical concerns intensified following renewed Iran-U.S. military clashes that threaten the already fragile ceasefire. The regional equity sell-off reflects investor anxiety over potential escalation and disrupted energy supplies.
content: Asia-Pacific markets open lower Friday, as concerns grew over renewed hostilities between Iran and the U.S. amid a fragile ceasefire.

zh.title: 亚太市场因美伊冲突后的新紧张局势低开
zh.summary: 随着美伊军事冲突重新升级威胁脆弱停火，地缘政治担忧加剧，亚太市场周五下跌。地区股票抛售反映了投资者对潜在升级和能源供应中断的担忧。
